text:
There were seven sisters, each as beautiful as the last. They celebrated their birthdays every 31 days, always with their favorite thing to do: throw a garden party at their family home.

On their birthday of seventh anniversary, they decided something grand. They all loved to dance, so they'd have a grand dance with their favorite fairy godmother.

They started at the kitchen door. Each took a handful of sparkling fairy dust, flitted about a little dance, and tossed a sprinkle towards their sisters. They spun around, caught those magical dusts in their hands, and launched into gigglesome twirls. Their laughter echoed through the house.

The evening went on with songs and silly dances. Laughter bubbled up from their hearts, mingling with the laughter dust. They were a stunning whirlwind of flutters and giggles.

Their fairy godmother arrived — radiant, adorned with twinkling stars and bows. She whispered enchantments, each making something magical happen. Suddenly, they
